rulings.Case Title: ROBERT J WORLEY VS. MARK WACHTER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Of Plaintiff For Leave To File An Amendment To The Prayer For Relief To Include Stearman Investigative Costs (Ccp Sections 473, 475 And Cc Sections 3300, 3333)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 18, 2026. Line 1. PLAINTIFF ROBERT WORLEY TRUSTEE OF WORLEY TRUST OF 2014 Motion Of Plaintiff For Leave To File An Amendment To The Prayer For Relief To Include Stearman Investigative Costs (Ccp Sections 473, 475 And Cc Sections 3300, 3333) is OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Settlement on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

DEFENDANT DRAGONFLY ASSETS C-52, LLC, AMIT HELLER Motion Of Forum Non Conveniens To Dismiss And/Or Transfer Action To The State Of Delaware; is DENIED. This action (as alleged) for rescission and fraud re: investment "to acquire the real property located at 1721 15th Steet, San Francisco, CA, demolish the structures thereon, and then construct a building to become developed into condominiums" that proceed in California. rulings.Case Title: VICTOR WANG VS. ANGELA GREENER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 18, 2026. Line 6.1. DEFENDANT DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Meet and Confer declaration filed concurrently with the motion does not specify any meet and confer efforts after April 3, 2026 automatic extension declaration was filed. The Court also notes that on April 1, 2026 a stipulation re filing of Second Amended Complaint has been filed. The Court has never received a hard courtesy copy of the stipulation or a hard copy of the order on stipulation for execution. The parties are order to meet and confer, and if upon such efforts, the parties are to stipulate to the filing of the Second Amended Complaint, the stipulation must be filed and courtesy copy of the stipulation and order must be promptly delivered to the Court. The parties shall meet and confer no later that June 30, 2026. If necessary and proper, Defendant may re-file the demurrer thereafter. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
